properties.name: SecuraOps
properties.activity: Develop a security culture and promote responsible behaviors

properties.name: Password Complexity
properties.description: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.

properties.name: Long Passphrases
properties.description: Users are encouraged to create long passphrases (≥ 20 characters).

properties.name: Password Reuse
properties.description: No reuse of an old password is allowed before 5 change cycles.

properties.name: Automatic Password Rotation
properties.description: Automatic rotation occurs every 180 days for standard accounts, 90 days for administrative accounts.

properties.name: Password Storage
properties.description: Passwords are stored as salted SHA-512 hashes and never transmitted in cleartext.

properties.name: MFA for Privileged Access
properties.description: The identity manager enforces MFA for all privileged access.

properties.name: API Secrets and Technical Account Management
properties.description: API secrets and technical accounts are managed in Azure Key Vault; rotations are automated via PowerShell scripts; no secret should be embedded in source code.

properties.name: Compromise Reporting
properties.description: Any suspicion of password compromise must be reported immediately to the SOC. A mandatory change is enforced within 4 hours.

properties.name: Employee Awareness
properties.description: An interactive training module reminds employees of best practices: password manager, no sharing, vigilance against phishing.

properties.name: Policy Review
properties.description: Annual or during major technological changes (SSO, MFA).

properties.claim_type: Change Deadline in Case of Compromise

properties.name: Azure Key Vault
properties.use: Management of API secrets and technical accounts

properties.name: Automatic Password Rotation
properties.requirement: Automatic rotation occurs every 180 days for standard accounts, 90 days for administrative accounts.

properties.name: Mandatory Change in Case of Compromise
properties.requirement: A mandatory change is enforced within 4 hours in case of suspected compromise.

properties.name: Policy Review
properties.requirement: Annual or during major technological changes (SSO, MFA).

properties.name: Classification Levels
properties.description: Define information classification levels: Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted

properties.name: Media Labeling
properties.description: Each document, database, or physical media must be labeled with its classification

properties.name: Classification Validation and Review
properties.description: Data owners validate the initial classification and review the levels annually

properties.name: Restricted Data Transfers
properties.description: Restricted data transfers require strong encryption and an approved channel

properties.name: Transfer Log Retention
properties.description: Transfer logs are retained for audit

properties.name: Retention Periods
properties.description: Retention periods are defined in the retention policy

properties.name: Secure Destruction
properties.description: Destruction is done via secure erasure (3-pass DoD) or physical shredding

properties.name: Strong Encryption for Restricted Transfers
properties.requirement: Restricted data transfers require strong encryption and an approved channel

properties.name: Annual Classification Review
properties.requirement: Review classification levels annually

properties.name: Transfer Log Retention
properties.requirement: Transfer logs are retained for audit

properties.name: Secure Data Destruction
properties.requirement: Destruction is done via secure erasure (3-pass DoD) or physical shredding

properties.name: Employee Awareness
properties.requirement: Train each employee to recognize and handle classified data correctly

properties.name: Classification Policy Review
properties.requirement: Annual review or upon introduction of a new data type

properties.name: Daily Backups
properties.description: Daily backups of production servers and application databases.

properties.scope: immutable backups on Azure Blob Storage

properties.name: Weekly internal and external scans
properties.requirement: Vulnerability detection

properties.name: SAST/DAST analysis
properties.requirement: Integration into CI/CD pipeline

properties.name: Patch validation
properties.requirement: Validation on pre-production environment before deployment

properties.name: Isolation of non-patchable equipment
properties.requirement: Isolate and replace non-patchable equipment

properties.name: Monthly reporting
properties.requirement: Monthly dashboards are distributed to the CISO and the Security Committee

properties.name: Quarterly review
properties.requirement: Quarterly review or after real incident

properties.name: Plan review
properties.requirement: Annual

properties.name: Crisis cell
properties.role: Activation in case of major disaster

properties.name: Annual tests

properties.name: Key Rotation
properties.requirement: Annual rotation or immediate rotation in case of administrator departure

properties.name: Audit of Cryptographic Mechanisms
properties.requirement: Verify the implementation of cryptographic mechanisms and compliance with ANSSI recommendations

properties.name: Restricted Access to Keys
properties.description: Access restricted to the CryptoOps group

properties.name: Log Recording
properties.description: Logs of key creation, usage, and rotation are exported to the SIEM

properties.name: Normal Change Typology
properties.description: require validation by the CAB committee

properties.name: Urgent Change Typology
properties.description: critical for security or production, requiring post-approval

properties.name: Submission Process
properties.description: Submission via ServiceNow with description, justification, and rollback plan

properties.description: Weekly CAB validation (CISO, IT Director, Domain Manager)

properties.name: Internal Communication
properties.description: Internal communication before deployment

properties.name: Post-Implementation Verification
properties.description: Post-implementation verification

properties.name: Request Logging
properties.description: All requests are tracked and retained for 24 months

properties.name: Security Change Categorization
properties.description: Security changes are categorized as 'Security Sensitive' and reported to the SOC

properties.name: Semi-Annual Review
properties.description: Semi-annual review

properties.name: Change Logging
properties.requirement: All requests are tracked and retained for 24 months

properties.requirement: Each developer attends annual training on secure coding practices

properties.requirement: Critical applications undergo an annual pentest

properties.description: Vulnerabilities identified in developed or integrated software

properties.name: Elastic Beats
properties.use: agents deployed on all servers for log collection

properties.name: Access to Logs
properties.requirement: Logs can only be accessed by authorized SOC Analysts

properties.name: Query Traceability
properties.requirement: Every query is traced in the audit log

properties.name: Split Tunnel Prohibition
properties.description: Split tunneling is prohibited for VPN connections

properties.name: Automatic Disconnection
properties.description: Automatic disconnection after 15 minutes of inactivity

properties.name: Temporary Accounts for External Providers
properties.description: External providers use temporary accounts valid for a maximum of 7 days

properties.name: Connection Logging and Auditing
properties.description: Connections are logged and audited by the SOC

properties.name: Remote Workstation Encryption
properties.description: Workstations must be encrypted (BitLocker)

properties.name: Remote Workstation Updates
properties.description: Workstations must be up to date

properties.name: EDR Protection
properties.description: Workstations must be protected by EDR

properties.name: Compliance Check
properties.description: A compliance check is performed before any connection

properties.name: Remote Access Policy Review
properties.requirement: Annual review or in case of major architecture change
